CAN: exclude reflections via z3 UNSAT (det=-1 is impossible in SO(3))
verify so(3) structure constants [Li,Lj]=eps_ijk Lk via sympy
represent SO(3) rotations as Spin(3) rotors in Cl(3,0) (double cover)
access SO(3) irreps D^l via e3nn (l=0,1,2,...)
compute Wigner D-matrices for arbitrary Euler angles via e3nn
measure geodesic distance on SO(3) manifold via geomstats
encode tower position in rustworkx DAG (parent=O(3), child=U(3))
CANNOT: include reflections (det=-1 elements are in O(3) but excluded from SO(3))
represent complex rotations (use U(3) for that)

pytorch.reason: load-bearing: SO(3) membership requires both M^T M = I AND det(M) = +1; torch.linalg verifies both constraints numerically for concrete rotations.

pyg.reason: not used: this probe isolates SO(3) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

z3.reason: load-bearing: z3 UNSAT proves no orthogonal matrix with det=-1 can be in SO(3); the orientation constraint det=+1 excludes all reflections.

cvc5.reason: not used: this probe isolates SO(3) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

sympy.reason: load-bearing: sympy verifies so(3) [Li,Lj]=eps_ijk Lk, Killing form negativity, and Casimir element for this shell.

clifford.reason: load-bearing: Spin(3) ≅ Cl(3,0)^+ even subalgebra rotors; SO(3) ≅ Spin(3) / {±1}; rotor sandwich product R v ~R gives SO(3) rotation.

geomstats.reason: load-bearing: geomstats SpecialOrthogonal(n=3) gives the bi-invariant Riemannian metric on SO(3); geodesic distance and group exponential verified.

e3nn.reason: load-bearing: e3nn provides SO(3) irreps D^l (spherical harmonics); this shell-local probe verifies D^1 (vector, 3D) and D^0 (scalar) irreps exist.

rustworkx.reason: load-bearing: rustworkx encodes SO(3) position in G-tower DAG: parent=O(3), child=U(3); betweenness centrality nonzero (interior node).

xgi.reason: not used: this probe isolates SO(3) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

toponetx.reason: not used: this probe isolates SO(3) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

gudhi.reason: not used: this probe isolates SO(3) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

rz_in_SO3.detail: Rz(pi/3): M^T M = I and det = +1: in SO(3)

so3_closed_under_composition.detail: Rz @ Rx: composition of SO(3) rotations is in SO(3)

z3_reflection_excluded_from_SO.detail: z3 UNSAT: no element can be both det=-1 (reflection) and det=+1 (special)

z3_O1_has_reflection.detail: z3 SAT: O(1) has det=-1 element (x=-1); SO(1) adds det=+1 constraint to exclude it

so3_killing_form_negative.detail: Killing form B(L1,L1) = -2 < 0: so(3) is compact (negative definite)

clifford_spin3_rotation.detail: Spin(3) rotor rotates e1 → e2 (90-deg rotation about e3)

e3nn_D2_irrep.detail: e3nn D^2 (rank-2 tensor) irrep has dimension 5

e3nn_wigner_D1_shape.detail: Wigner D-matrix for D^1 at Euler angles (0.1,0.2,0.3): shape (3,3)

geomstats_so3_identity_belongs.detail: geomstats: identity matrix belongs to SO(3) manifold

so3_tower_interior.detail: SO(3) is an interior node (in=1, out=1) in the G-tower DAG

so3_after_o3_in_topo_sort.detail: Topological sort: SO(3) comes after O(3) (orientation is a derived constraint)

reflection_excluded_from_SO3.detail: Reflection is in O(3) (M^T M=I) but NOT in SO(3) (det=-1)

scaling_not_in_SO3.detail: Scaling matrix violates M^T M = I: excluded from O(3) and SO(3)

identity_in_SO3.detail: Identity is in SO(3): det=1, M^T M = I

e3nn_irrep_dims_first4.detail: e3nn D^l irrep dimensions: dim(D^l) = 2l+1 for l=0,1,2,3
